name: Game of thrones RPG
description:
𝔸 𝕊𝕠𝕟𝘨 𝕠𝕗 𝕀𝕔𝕖 𝒶𝓃𝒹 𝔽𝓲𝓻𝓮

╪═══════ ♱ ━━━ ❄️ ━━━ ♱ ═══════╪

“There is a beast in every man, and it stirs when you put a sword in his hand.” The snow falls heavy on the wolfswood. The ash falls heavy on the Red Keep. The ink on the parchment dries, sealing the deaths of ten thousand men before the sun even rises.

This is a world that runs on spilled blood, broken oaths, and ancient debts. On one side: a stifling, gold-draped council chamber in King's Landing where a single whispered lie can exterminate an eight-hundred-year-old bloodline. On the other side: a towering wall of weeping ice holding back a mythological apocalypse that the southern lords treat as a children's fairy tale.

Half of this world is a cutthroat, Machiavellian political thriller where courtesy is armor and marriage is a weapon. The other half is a dark, survival-horror epic where dragons incinerate armies in heartbeats and the dead rise with blue eyes in the dark.

The most dangerous thing in Westeros isn't the man with the sword. It's the man holding the pen.

When you play the game of thrones, you win or you die. There is no middle ground.

🩸 There is a golden throne room smelling of incense and old blood, filled with smiling lords who are quietly counting your mistakes. There is an icy courtyard in the North where an honorable man swings a greatsword to execute a terrified boy who was telling the absolute truth. There is a burning desert across the sea where an exiled teenage girl is learning the precise temperature required to melt a slaver's chains.

Half of this world is a Machiavellian political thriller where a single whispered rumor can exterminate an eight-hundred-year-old bloodline. The other half is a mythic survival horror where the climate itself is a death sentence, dragons incinerate armies in heartbeats, and the dead march in the dark.

The most dangerous thing in any room isn't the man with the drawn sword. It's the quiet man in the corner keeping score. 🛡️

THE PLAYERS & THE PAWNS

  • Eddard "Ned" Stark — The Honorable Sacrifice. A northern lord who brings a strict moral code to a city of liars, discovering too late that truth is a fatal vulnerability.

  • Catelyn Stark — The Fierce Matriarch. A mother driven by a terrifying, uncompromising devotion to her children, willing to plunge the realm into war to protect her blood.

  • Robb Stark — The Young Wolf. A brilliant, undefeated battlefield tactician who learns the hard way that wars are lost in the bedchamber and at the dinner table.

  • Sansa Stark — The Steel Survivor. Stripped of her romantic illusions through systemic abuse, she has forged her trauma into armor and learned to wield leverage like a blade.
